TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Hupu = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Hupu. 56 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 167 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 66% niqan 111 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 34% niqan 56 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 16%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 3%, Tayal 1%, Truku 6%, Paiwan 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = ħupu = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sinʦuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ ħupu. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, saki*aja *%, bunun *%, tajal *%, tɾuku *%, paiwan *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = Hupu = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Sincungsyang ka alang Hupu. 56 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 167 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 66% niqan 111 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 34% niqan 56 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 16%, Sakizaya 1%, Bunun 3%, Tayal 1%, Truku 6%, Paiwan 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = ħupu = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sinʦuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ ħupu. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, saki*aja *%, bunun *%, tajal *%, tɾuku *%, paiwan *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
